summary: Frontend testing completed for Admin Print Submission AI Analysis feature. All requested features verified: Print Submission button visible, AI Analysis section displays Trust Score (15/100), Trust Level (Very Low), AI Summary, Red Flags with severity badges (4 flags - HIGH/MEDIUM), and AI Recommendations. The handlePrint function (lines 296-598) generates complete HTML including AI Analysis section (lines 523-584).

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Print Submission AI Analysis feature fully implemented and tested. The handlePrint function generates complete HTML with AI Analysis section including: Trust Score (color-coded based on score), Trust Level badge, AI Summary, Red Flags with severity badges (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW), and AI Recommendations. The print window uses window.open() and window.print() which triggers browser print dialog. Code verified at AdminPage.jsx lines 523-584.
